summary: Iteration 32: Backend Regression Testing after major refactoring (server.py split from 1487 lines into 7 route files). Fixed router order bug where /api/reservations/alerts was being matched by /api/reservations/{reservation_id}. Backend: 24/24 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All pages load correctly - Assets, Gantt, Planning.

integration_issues.issue: External Omniyat API slow - assets show skeleton loaders while waiting for data
integration_issues.note: This is expected behavior due to external API latency, not a bug

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/roles returns 4 roles (super_admin, admin_client, manager, terrain)
Backend: POST /api/reservations/{id}/approve changes status to confirmed
Backend: POST /api/reservations/{id}/reject changes status to rejected
Frontend: Assets page has view toggle (cards/list)
Frontend: Assets page has column config button
Frontend: Assets column presets work (Vue complète/Vue standard/Vue simple)
Frontend: Gantt page loads at /reservation/gantt with 22 asset rows
Frontend: Gantt page has search, status filter, days selector
Frontend: Planning page loads at /reservation/planning with 43 reservations

bugs_fixed.issue: Router order bug - /api/reservations/alerts was being matched by /api/reservations/{reservation_id}
bugs_fixed.fix: Moved alerts_router include BEFORE reservations_router in server.py

critical_code_review_comments: Backend refactoring successful: server.py reduced from 1487 to ~137 lines
7 route files properly organized: zones.py, reservations.py, alerts.py, notifications.py, roles.py, maintenance.py, seed.py
shared.py correctly exports db, ws_manager, http_client, create_notification
Asset delete bug fix confirmed: parseInt(item.id, 10) in PremiumAssets.jsx line 166
Router order is critical: alerts_router must be included before reservations_router to avoid route conflicts
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed reservations for approval testing during regression tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 32 was a REGRESSION test after major backend refactoring. server.py was split into 7 route files. Key finding: Router order matters - alerts_router must be included before reservations_router because /api/reservations/alerts would otherwise be matched by /api/reservations/{reservation_id}. All 24 backend endpoints tested and working. Frontend pages: Assets at /view/engin/index (with column presets), Gantt at /reservation/gantt, Planning at /reservation/planning. External Omniyat API may be slow causing skeleton loaders on Assets page.
